failures.description: The agent misread or mishandled the tool result: it should have reported item_id 1096508426 priced at $46.13, but instead claimed there were no matches.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to answer which available beginner Jigsaw Puzzle items cost more than $45.76. The ProductCatalogSearch output at index 3 returned one matching item with price 46.13, which is above 45.76. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite answer, saying no items match. This directly contradicts the relevant tool output and is therefore a reasoning error over tool results, not an invalid invocation or underspecified intent.
